comment.body: exactamente, ingresas a la publicación del día, vas al final y encontrarás los datos y las probabilidades, copias y pegas en el script. En el caso de Greg, lee atentamente la publicación de Alma, para ir tomando otros datos relevantes en cuanto a zonas, y las carga manualmente a su gráfica, por eso se verá distinta a la tya cuando cargues el script. Recomiendo que hagas lo mismo, es decir, lee la publicación, analiza y carga la información a tu gráfica, sirve para estar orientado por fuera de la operación diaria.

comment.body:
Hello Luis, Ive been taking her weekly posts and making comma separated value text strings through some basic excel formulas.  It takes a few minutes every Sunday.  From there you can post in your trading view indicator.  I have es adjusted values based on most recent rth close for es and spx .  Here is a sample from what I have loaded up.  $ES1!: short fly pattern centering around, 6742.26, downside target of, 6529.05, meaning we can get a relatively slow decline if the downside pivot proves it by producing growing realized volatility as spot approaches the level of, 6590.89, any upside move would be confirmed around, 6863.28, betting on a rebound rally with no new ATH. Target is, 6900.01, Vol H, 6832.53, Vol L, 6675.21, Vol H+, 6870.58, Vol L+, 6637.16
$SPX: short fly pattern centering around, 6717.19, downside target of, 6503.98, meaning we can get a relatively slow decline if the downside pivot proves it by producing growing realized volatility as spot approaches the level of, 6565.82, any upside move would be confirmed around, 6838.21, betting on a rebound rally with no new ATH. Target is, 6874.94, Vol H, 6807.46, Vol L, 6650.14, Vol H+, 6845.51, Vol L+, 6612.09
$NQ1!: NQ H, 25574.94, NQ L, 24757.563, NQ H+, 25772.61, NQ L+, 24559.88
$GC1!: GC H, 4063.37, GC L, 3952.24, GC H+, 4090.24, GC L+, 3925.36
